race.comment: ADJUDICATE (1) is a consistent type who has raced outside BM56 grade since the nice win four back, so will appreciate the drop back in grade. Winnable race and fancied to make the most of it. PARIS AFFAIR (14) was quite unlucky two back at Echuca and then ran well again last time, beaten only 1-3/4 lengths. Peak fitness now and the low draw could be a big plus. EPOCH (6) was comfortably accounted for when fourth last time out over 2238m at Werribee, beaten 4.5 lengths. That followed a win at Stawell at the previous outing. Nicely placed to feature in the finish. MISS NIAGARA (16) is next best coming off a last start win.
